component.name: Webex Web
component.summary: Run the Webex web client in its own window

description.p: Webex Web runs web.webex.com in a standalone window instead of a browser tab. It keeps you logged in between sessions, adds a tray icon, shows desktop notifications, and grants the camera, microphone, and screen-sharing access that meetings need.
This is an independent project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Cisco. Webex is a trademark of Cisco.
